decoration: minimal — one or two subtle shapes
hero_layout: scattered — name, title, links placed around the viewport freely
hero_headline_scale: subtle — standard h1 size, nothing crazy
nav_style: fixed top bar — always visible on scroll
card_style: minimal — no cards, just separated content blocks
scroll_animation: moderate — staggered entrance of cards and elements
contact_style: map-themed — as if marking your location
spacing_density: tight — compact, lots of content visible
bonus_quirk: the daily regen banner is styled as a handwritten note
